response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies, aligning well with the technical requirements. However, her experience in production-grade AI solutions and leadership in GenAI-specific projects is less explicitly documented, warranting further exploration during an interview.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes).
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq.
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams, with a strong focus on engineering excellence.
concerns: Limited explicit documentation of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions (GenAI/RAG focus unclear).
No mention of vector databases or retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures in resume.
Lack of advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields, though practical experience partially offsets this.
